isolation.scope: repo and designated evidence/report paths only

assertions.title: Fog updates only on player tile change

steps.action: Inspect contract-linked fog tests and source references
steps.expected: Coverage proves same-tile updates do not recalculate fog
steps.observed: FogOfWarOptimization.test.ts verifies update() returns false and keeps dirty set empty for repeated same-tile calls; PerformanceIntegration.test.ts confirms dirty tiles refresh only on new tile movement.
Targeted vitest run passed including FogOfWarOptimization.test.ts and PerformanceIntegration.test.ts.

assertions.title: Fog explored state persists across sessions

steps.action: Inspect persistence tests for FogOfWarCore save/load
steps.expected: Coverage proves explored tiles survive save/load/zone transition
steps.observed: FogOfWarOptimization.test.ts and PerformanceIntegration.test.ts contain round-trip save/load assertions and zone-transition persistence checks.
Targeted vitest run passed all persistence-related fog tests.

assertions.title: No per-frame object allocations in update loop

steps.action: Inspect optimization coverage and source references
steps.expected: Tests/code review show in-place buff mutation, numeric explored storage, and cached equip stats
steps.observed: UpdateLoopOptimization.test.ts covers in-place splice, numeric Uint8Array explored tiles, and equip-stat caching semantics; ZoneScene.ts uses buffs.splice in reverse iteration and getEquipStats() cache path.
Targeted vitest run passed UpdateLoopOptimization.test.ts and integration coverage.

steps.action: Inspect squared-distance utility/tests and call sites
steps.expected: distanceSq utility exists and threshold-comparison call sites use it
steps.observed: UpdateLoopOptimization.test.ts and PerformanceIntegration.test.ts validate distanceSq semantics; IsometricUtils.ts exports distanceSq and ZoneScene.ts uses distanceSq across proximity checks.
Targeted vitest run passed UpdateLoopOptimization.test.ts, SpatialGrid.test.ts, and PerformanceIntegration.test.ts.

assertions.title: EventBus health/mana events fire only on change

steps.action: Inspect update-loop event emission tests and source references
steps.expected: Tests show health/mana events emit only when values change
steps.observed: UpdateLoopOptimization.test.ts covers change-only event emission semantics; relevant event emit sites are in Player.ts and ZoneScene.ts.
Targeted vitest run passed UpdateLoopOptimization.test.ts.

steps.action: Inspect integration coverage for target selection and AoE queries
steps.expected: Tests prove targeting correctness after spatial/distance changes
steps.observed: PerformanceIntegration.test.ts covers nearest targeting, AoE target selection, and integrated proximity checks.
Targeted vitest run passed PerformanceIntegration.test.ts and SpatialGrid.test.ts.

steps.expected: Tests verify monsters/player safe-zone proximity logic is unchanged
steps.observed: PerformanceIntegration.test.ts contains safe-zone query checks; SpatialGrid.test.ts includes safe-zone pre-filtering coverage.
Targeted vitest run passed all safe-zone related tests.

assertions.title: Spatial index returns correct nearby monsters

steps.observed: SpatialGrid.test.ts explicitly labels VAL-PERF-009 and compares queryRadius results with brute-force scans; PerformanceIntegration.test.ts cross-checks queries with distanceSq.
Targeted vitest run passed SpatialGrid.test.ts and PerformanceIntegration.test.ts.

assertions.title: Spatial index updates on monster movement

steps.expected: Movement across cells updates index state
steps.observed: SpatialGrid.test.ts explicitly labels VAL-PERF-010 and covers same-cell moves, cross-cell transfer, sequential moves, and auto-insert on update; PerformanceIntegration.test.ts also verifies movement updates.
Targeted vitest run passed movement-related spatial tests.

assertions.title: Monster spawn and death updates spatial index

steps.expected: Spawn insertions and death removals leave no stale entries
steps.observed: SpatialGrid.test.ts explicitly labels VAL-PERF-011 and covers spawn, removal, stale-entry cleanup, and respawn at new position.
Targeted vitest run passed lifecycle-related spatial tests.

assertions.title: All existing tests pass

steps.action: Run full test suite (npx vitest run)
steps.expected: Zero test failures across the suite
steps.observed: Full vitest run reported 1 failed file / 1 failed test: FogOfWarOptimization.test.ts > 'dirty tiles contain correct column and row within bounds' timed out at 5000ms; 2762 tests passed.

assertions.issues: Full test suite does not currently meet the contract because one fog-of-war test times out after 5000ms.

steps.observed: Command exited successfully with no diagnostic output.
Build succeeded; Vite emitted only a large chunk size warning.

frictions.description: The shared user-testing guidance file at /Users/feuvan/.factory/library/user-testing.md was not present, so validation relied on mission-local AGENTS.md and validation-contract.md only.
frictions.resolution: Continued with available mission guidance and project instructions.

summary: Validated 12 assigned performance assertions via code/test inspection and command evidence. Targeted performance tests passed, typecheck passed, and build passed; full vitest failed due to one timeout in FogOfWarOptimization.test.ts, so VAL-PERF-013 is fail while the other assigned assertions pass.
